description: Flight Planning & Weather — personal FRAT, weather briefing, NOTAM filtering, personal minimums enforcement, and go/no-go assessment

hard_stops.label: Below Personal Minimums
hard_stops.logic: Conditions do not meet the pilot's own stated personal minimums — advisory hard stop with pilot override available

hard_stops.label: TFR on Route
hard_stops.logic: Temporary Flight Restriction active along the planned route — reroute required

hard_stops.label: Fuel Insufficient
hard_stops.logic: Calculated fuel at destination falls below required reserves per 14 CFR 91.167 (IFR) or prudent VFR reserves

soft_flags.label: Weather Marginal for Experience Level
soft_flags.logic: Weather conditions are marginal relative to the pilot's experience level and ratings

soft_flags.label: NOTAM Advisories on Route
soft_flags.logic: Active NOTAMs affect airports or airspace along the planned route

soft_flags.label: Density Altitude High
soft_flags.logic: Density altitude at departure or destination exceeds 5000 feet above field elevation

soft_flags.label: No Alternate Planned for IFR
soft_flags.logic: IFR flight plan filed without an alternate airport when weather at destination does not meet 1-2-3 rule
